# cite.me.in

> Monitor your brand's visibility in AI-generated responses. Cite.me.in tracks when and where AI platforms — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity — cite your website in their answers. Think of it as Google Search Console, but for LLMs. Squirrel-brain friendly.

## How it works

1. Add your website domain
2. We suggest ready-to-run queries based on your content
3. Each week we run your queries across every major AI platform with web search enabled
4. Every URL that appears in an AI response gets recorded — you see which platforms cite you, how often, and for which queries

## Who it's for

- **Solo founders** — know if AI platforms are sending you traffic or ignoring you
- **Small businesses** — find out if ChatGPT and Copilot mention you in their answers
- **Marketing teams** — track AI citation visibility as a channel, see trends, compare platforms
